@startuml
!define EnumIconColor #f8b195
!define EnumIconLetter "E"
!define EnumIconBgColor #f8b195
!define EnumIconBorderColor #d68c75
!define EnumIconTextColor #ffffff

class ConquestMapPart {
  <<enum>>
  String part
  ConquestMapPart(String part)
  ConquestMapPart values()
  ConquestMapPart valueOf(String name)
  String getPart()
  ConquestMapPart fromString(String part)
}

ConquestMapPart as EnumConquestMapPart

EnumConquestMapPart ..> ConquestMapPart : extends

@enduml
